reviews.comment:
EVITEN EL ACA, Y EN PARTICULAR LA SEDE DE VILLA DEVOTO !!!!
Pésima atención, tanto de la empleada, como la de su colega masculino.  Mal educados, maltratan al cliente.  Mala predisposición y falta de educación, soberbia.  En general, la atención del ACA es mala, y cada vez peor, y estos dos empleados son un fiel reflejo de esa institución.

(Translated by Google)
AVOID THE ACA, AND ESPECIALLY THE VILLA DEVOTO BRANCH!!!!
Terrible service, both from the female employee and her male colleague. Rude and abusive to customers. Unhelpful, uneducated, and arrogant. In general, the service at the ACA is bad, and getting worse all the time, and these two employees are a perfect reflection of that institution.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZOHYtMXl3RRAB
